text:

> See if you can get them to suck down 2.81 instead though, as 2.8 had
> an awful
> bug that I just fixed.  It didn't work right on amd64.  There are no
> impacts on dependencies and the rest of the script universe, just
> more or less an invisible
> bug fix.
> 
> http://ourmon.cat.pdx.edu/ourmon/ourmon281.tar.gz
> 
> And to answer the question:  yes
> 
> Should I test it?
> 
> Jim
